name: Polish Noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown butter in a Dutch oven.
2. Add remaining ingredients except onions, salt (if using), and pepper. Mix well.
3. Simmer uncovered for 10 minutes.
4. Add onions and cook an additional 5 minutes.
(Note: Cook macaroni al dente to avoid overcooking. Use light sour cream if desired.)
